title: Solar System
text: The Solar System consists of the Sun and the objects that orbit it. Earth is the third planet from the Sun. Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.

title: Marie Curie
text: Marie Curie was a physicist and chemist. She conducted pioneering research on radioactivity and won Nobel Prizes in Physics and Chemistry.

title: Copenhagen
text: Copenhagen is the capital of Denmark. The city lies mainly on the islands of Zealand and Amager.
